Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}The student council president would like to speak with you. Please report to the student council room immediately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}The president wants to speak with me...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}D-Don't tell me she thinks I stole the money too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}And if I talk to her, at least I won't have to trouble you anymore, {f 4 1}-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}O-Oh, I see! I didn't realize you two knew each other so well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}...Um, shall we head to the student council room then?[n]{f 1 1}
